title: pteris cadieri subsp. walkeri
intro: Pteris cadieri subsp. walkeri, also known as Walkeri's fern or Walking fern, is a subspecies of the Pteris cadieri plant, belonging to the family Pteridaceae. It is primarily found in the tropical forests of Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia, Thailand, and Indonesia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Pteris cadieri subsp. walkeri is prepared in various forms, including tea, infusion, and dried powder, which can be used to relieve stress, improve sleep, and boost the immune system.
